semantic.role: Test suite for ViewService providing integration-level verification of view derivation, rendering, and lifecycle management.
responsibilities: Verify that ViewService correctly derives view data from indexed SpineUnit instances.
Ensure temporary temporary directories are created and cleaned up before/after each test.
Validate that generated views conform to expected schema versions, generator versions, and content structure.
outOfScope: Does not export any production symbols or interfaces.
Does not define new views or modify the ViewService contract.
Does not implement runtime logic for production use.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts per rule test-file-suffix. This file follows that convention.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Integration test suite for the ViewService module that validates end-to-end view generation from indexed units.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactored to align with updated ViewService interfaces and import paths after removal of legacy CLI aliases.
